Class TransferRequest

java.lang.Object
shelter.domain.TransferRequest
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<TransferRequest>
public class TransferRequest extends Object implements Comparable<TransferRequest>
Represents a request to transfer an animal from one shelter to another. A transfer request begins in RequestStatus.PENDING and transitions to RequestStatus.APPROVED, RequestStatus.REJECTED, or RequestStatus.CANCELLED based on administrative review.

    Constructs a new TransferRequest in RequestStatus.PENDING status.

  • Constructor Details

    • TransferRequest

      public TransferRequest(String id, Animal animal, Shelter from, Shelter to, RequestStatus status, LocalDateTime requestedAt)
      Reconstruction constructor for deserializing a TransferRequest from persistent storage. This constructor accepts an explicit id, pre-existing status, and request timestamp so that the full transfer state can be restored from CSV data without modification.
      Parameters:
      id - the pre-existing unique identifier; must not be null or blank
      animal - the animal to be transferred; must not be null
      from - the source shelter; must not be null
      to - the destination shelter; must not be null and must differ from from
      status - the current status of the request; must not be null
      requestedAt - the original timestamp when the request was submitted; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null, id is blank, or shelters are the same

    • TransferRequest

      public TransferRequest(Animal animal, Shelter from, Shelter to)
      Constructs a new TransferRequest in RequestStatus.PENDING status. All parameters are required, and the source and destination shelters must differ.
      Parameters:
      animal - the animal to be transferred; must not be null
      from - the source shelter; must not be null
      to - the destination shelter; must not be null and must differ from from
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if any parameter is null, or if source and destination are the same shelter

    • TransferRequest

      public TransferRequest(TransferRequest other)
      Copy constructor that creates a new TransferRequest with all field values copied from other. The copy preserves the same ID, animal, shelters, status, and timestamp.
      Parameters:
      other - the TransferRequest instance to copy; must not be null

  • Method Details

    • approve

      public void approve()
      Approves this transfer request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.APPROVED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • reject

      public void reject()
      Rejects this transfer request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.REJECTED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • cancel

      public void cancel()
      Cancels this transfer request, transitioning its status to RequestStatus.CANCELLED. This method may only be called while the request is in RequestStatus.PENDING status.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the request is not currently RequestStatus.PENDING

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns the unique identifier of this transfer request.
      Returns:
      the UUID string identifying this request

    • getAnimal

      public Animal getAnimal()
      Returns the animal to be transferred.
      Returns:
      the Animal associated with this request

    • getFrom

      public Shelter getFrom()
      Returns the source shelter from which the animal is being transferred.
      Returns:
      the source Shelter

    • getTo

      public Shelter getTo()
      Returns the destination shelter to which the animal is being transferred.
      Returns:
      the destination Shelter

    • getStatus

      public RequestStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current status of this transfer request.
      Returns:
      the RequestStatus of this request

    • getRequestedAt

      public LocalDateTime getRequestedAt()
      Returns the timestamp at which this transfer request was created.
      Returns:
      the creation LocalDateTime

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(TransferRequest other)
      Compares this request to another by request timestamp ascending. Earlier requests are ordered first, reflecting the natural queue order.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<TransferRequest>
      Parameters:
      other - the other TransferRequest to compare to
      Returns:
      a negative number if this request was submitted earlier, positive if later, zero if equal

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if the given object is a TransferRequest with the same ID.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - the object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is a TransferRequest with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code based on this request's unique ID. Consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      the hash code

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this request including ID, animal, shelters, and status.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      a human-readable description of this request
